prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、新能源相关专业（储能、氢能等）社会热度持续 升温；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万人，较2025年增加约0.3万人，物理类考生估算约36.48万人，竞争略有加剧；该 校位于河北省保定市，属于本省高校，对本省考生具有天然的地域便利性和认可度；该校在本省招生计划占比较大，物理类约334人，属于省内重点招生院校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 16515 → 18643 → 20607 → 22433 → 24100, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 7585 places; the annual shift magnitudes in the past 4 years were 2128, 1964, 1826, and 1667 places respectively, with the shift speed narrowing year by year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 24100; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 270 in 2021, 277 in 2022, 274 in 2023, 335 in 2024, and 335 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 334, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, a slight reduction of about 0.3%, which has minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 84th, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, indicating a clear positioning; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; its popularity on Douyin is average, not entering the top 100 national university popularity rankings, with short video exposure at a medium level, and no abnormal fluctuations in application attention; the Electrical Engineering discipline is rated A (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, both core disciplines supporting the power industry, closely corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Electrical and Energy Power, providing sustained appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Electrical Engineering and Automation, and new energy-related majors (energy storage, hydrogen energy, etc.) continues to heat up; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is about 609,800, an increase of about 3,000 compared to 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 364,800, indicating slightly intensified competition; the university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, a provincial university with natural regional convenience and recognition for local candidates; its enrollment plan in the province accounts for a large proportion, about 334 in Physics Category, making it a key provincial enrollment institution.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of continuous but narrowing backward shift in historical rankings, the basically unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the slight increase in the total number of provincial candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 24100; the predicted minimum ranking is about 24087, with a range of 23587–24587.
